# Gcore WAAP

- [Overview](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/overview.md): Gcore WAAP provides real-time application-layer protection with WAF policies, bot management, API protection, rate limiting, IP controls, and threat intellig...

## Getting started
- [Configure WAAP for a new domain](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/getting-started/configure-waap-for-a-domain.md): Create CDN resource with WAAP enabled, configure origin server details, update DNS records, and verify traffic routing through Gcore network.
- [Manage domains protected with WAAP](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/getting-started/manage-domains.md): Disable or delete WAAP-protected domains in CDN resources; manage domain statuses (Monitoring, Protection, Disabled) and toggle WAAP protection in Security s...
- [Billing](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/getting-started/billing.md): Configure WAAP billing plans (Free, Start, Pro, Enterprise) with feature availability for IP Firewall, WAF rules, Bot Management, and API Security across Dom...

## Analytics
- [WAAP Analytics](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/waap-analytics.md): Monitor WAAP-protected application traffic, security events, and attack patterns across domains via Dashboard, Events, and Domains analytics sections.
- [Dashboard](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/dashboard.md): Monitor WAAP traffic across account and domain scopes; view detected/prevented attacks, request metrics, and security anomalies via consolidated dashboard fo...
- [Events](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/events.md): Filter HTTP requests and security events in WAAP Events by time range, event type, action (Blocked/Monitored/Allowed/Passed), country, IP, path, HTTP method,...
- [Domains](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/domains.md): View protected applications, APIs, and services in WAAP inventory; filter domains for incident investigation, environment isolation, and attack pressure anal...

## Firewall
- [Access control](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/firewall/access-control.md): Configure WAAP Firewall allowed/blocked IPs, IP ranges, and CDN security policies to permit or deny traffic by IP address, geography, and request metadata.
- [IP Reputation](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/firewall/ip-reputation.md): Block malicious IP addresses using WAAP IP Reputation policies: TOR networks, proxies, hosting services, VPNs, bots, NAT ranges, external blocklists, and CDNs.
- [Check IP](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/firewall/check-ip.md): Verify IP address reputation in WAAP with local and global reputation tags, detection timestamps, and domain associations.
- [L7 DDoS protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/ddos-protection.md): Detect and mitigate Layer 7 DDoS attacks on web applications using WAAP Monitoring and Protection modes with configurable global thresholds.

## Default Rules
- [WAAP policies](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies.md): Configure WAAP policy groups to block malicious traffic, prevent data breaches, filter bots, and customize security rules for web applications.
- [OWASP threats](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/waf-and-owasp-top-threats.md): Configure WAF & OWASP Top 10 policies including SQL injection, XSS, shellshock, open redirect, and PII detection rules in Gcore Customer Portal.
- [Behavioral WAF](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/behavioral-waf.md): Configure Behavioral WAF policies in WAAP to block brute-force, probing, obfuscated attacks, and repeated violations using CAPTCHA and JavaScript validation.
- [CMS protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/cms-protection.md): Configure WAAP CMS protection policies to allowlist authenticated WordPress, MODX, and Drupal admin sessions while blocking known CMS exploits.

## Custom Rules
- [WAAP rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules.md): Configure WAAP firewall, custom, and advanced rules with IP allowlists/blocklists, geolocation, SQL injection, XSS, and string-matching criteria to protect w...
- [Custom Rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules.md): Create WAAP custom rules with conditions and actions (Allow, Block, CAPTCHA, JS Challenge, Tag) to filter web requests, control URL access, and enforce rate ...
- [Rate-Limiting](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules/advanced-rate-limiting-rules.md): Configure request.limit_rate method with threshold, time window, filters, and aggregation scope to enforce rate limiting rules via WAAP API.

## Advanced rules
- [Advanced Rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules.md): Create and manage advanced WAAP custom rules using Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax via API with complex conditional logic and single-action enforcement.
- [Advanced rule objects and attributes](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules/advanced-rule-objects.md): Reference advanced rule objects and attributes including client_data, request, response containers with fingerprint, headers, status, rate_limit, and ip_in_r...
- [Source field objects in advanced rule expressions](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules/source-field-objects.md): Reference source field objects (request, headers, ip, uri, path, method, origin_ip, ja3) and syntax for advanced rule expressions in WAF/security policies.

## Tag rules
- [Tag rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules/tag-rules.md): Create tag-based and tag-generating rules in WAAP custom rules to filter traffic using predefined tags, user-defined tags, and conditional logic.
- [Reserved tags](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules/tag-rules/reserved-tags.md): Configure reserved tags in WAAP custom rules to trigger specific actions: Registered, Logged In, Paid, Monitor, API Privileged Access, Auth Endpoint, and oth...
- [Predefined tags and their descriptions](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules/tag-rules/predefined-tags.md): Reference predefined tags with API slugs for filtering and sanctioning web requests using behavioral analysis, heuristics, and AI models in tag-based rules.

## Bot Management
- [Bot Protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting/enable-troubleshoot-bot-protection.md): Detect and block unauthorized bots using User-Agent validation, traffic source analysis, behavioral analysis, and headless browser detection; manage allowed ...
- [Known Bots](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/known-bots.md): Allow or block traffic from legitimate automated services including Google, Microsoft, Slack, PayPal bots and SEO crawlers using Known Bots policy in WAAP Bo...
- [Anti-automation and bot protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/anti-automation-and-bot-protection.md): Configure WAAP Bot Management policies including anti-spam, traffic anomaly, automated clients, headless browsers, anti-scraping, and vulnerability scanner r...
- [Invalid user agent and unknown user agent](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/invalid-user-agent-and-unknown-user-agent.md): Block requests with missing or non-standard user-agent headers using WAAP invalid user agent and unknown user agent policies.

## Threat Intelligence

## Security Insights
- [Security Insights](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/threat-intelligence/security-insights/security-insights.md): Monitor domain security threats through system-generated notifications detecting misconfigurations, rule issues, and vulnerabilities with remediation recomme...
- [View and investigate insights](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/threat-intelligence/security-insights/view-insights.md): Monitor system-generated WAAP security insights including attack detection on disabled policies and allowed high-risk IP addresses via Gcore Customer Portal.
- [Manage insight status](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/threat-intelligence/security-insights/manage-insights.md): Change security insight status using Mark as read, Silence, and Close buttons; manage notification pauses and reopen closed insights.
- [Manage Silence Rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/threat-intelligence/security-insights/manage-silence-rules.md): Edit or delete Silence Rules in WAAP Security Insights to adjust notification duration and suppress irrelevant alerts per domain.
- [IP Spotlight](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/threat-intelligence/ip-spotlight.md): Analyze IP addresses for threat intelligence using risk scores, global/domain activity, request metrics, and malicious behavior detection in WAAP.

## API Protection
- [API discovery and protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/api-discovery-and-protection.md): Detect and protect API endpoints using Gcore WAAP API Discovery, base path configuration, and role-based access control with reserved tags.
- [API discovery](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/api-discovery-and-protection/api-discovery.md): Scan domain traffic to discover, validate, and manage REST API endpoints including legacy and shadow APIs for WAAP protection via API Baseline, Potential API...
- [Configure API access and protection with reserved tags](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/api-discovery-and-protection/configure-api-access-with-reserved-tags.md): Configure API protection with reserved tags (API Admin Access, API Privileged Access, etc.) via custom rules and API Discovery to control endpoint access by ...
- [Manually add endpoints to the API base path](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/api-discovery-and-protection/configure-api-base-path.md): Manually add API endpoint paths to WAAP domain base path via Customer Portal Settings to define communication paths and protect APIs without API Discovery en...
- [Advanced API protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/advanced-api-protection.md): Configure Advanced API protection policies including auth token protection, sensitive data exposure blocking, invalid JSON traffic filtering, and API-level a...
- [Protocol validation](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/protocol-validation.md): Configure HTTP/HTTPS protocol validation rules in WAAP Bot Management to block non-compliant requests, malformed methods, and service protocol tampering.

## Response pages
- [Response pages](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/response-pages.md): Configure WAAP challenge and block response pages triggered by policies or custom rules, including browser validation, CAPTCHA, and CSRF blocks with customiz...
- [Create custom response pages](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/response-pages/create-custom-response-pages.md): Configure custom response pages with personalized titles, messages, and HTML content for Block, CSRF, Captcha, and browser validation triggers in WAAP accoun...
- [Manage custom response pages](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/response-pages/manage-custom-response-pages.md): Configure custom response pages at account and domain levels in WAAP, including switching page sets, modifying pages, managing statuses, and applying changes...

## FAQs
- [Frequently asked questions](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions.md): Resolve common WAAP questions about JavaScript injection, required cookies, and storage variables.
- [How does WAAP JavaScript injection work?](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions/javascript-injection.md): Explain WAAP JavaScript injection mechanism for client fingerprinting, browser signatures, and GUI interaction detection via cookies and /sbbi/ endpoint.
- [What are the required cookies used by WAAP?](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions/waap-cookies.md): Document WAAP cookies with Set-Cookie response headers, sessionID, usertag, CSRF protection, CAPTCHA validation, DDoS protection, and load balancing attributes.
- [What storage variables does WAAP use?](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions/storage-variables.md): List local storage variables used by WAAP including cnv, csr, otr, and altutgv2 for CAPTCHA, mouse tracking, and user tag token data.
- [Troubleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting.md): Diagnose and resolve Gcore WAAP issues including bot protection, blocked users, and 5xx server errors.
- [Troubleshoot blocked users](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-blocked-users.md): Diagnose blocked users by searching Reference IDs in WAAP Events, inspecting request details including IP, timestamp, HTTP method, and triggered security rules.
- [Troubleshoot 5xx errors](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-5xx-errors.md): Diagnose 5xx server errors in WAAP including 543 errors caused by origin server downtime, firewall blocks, misconfigurations, or connection timeouts.
